figures.caption: Table 1. Main Results on xCodeEval. We report Pass@k (k=1, 3, 5), Target Compilation Rate (CR𝑇 ), and Source/C++ Compilation Rate (CR𝑆 ). High CR𝑆 indicates syntactic interference. Best results (for performance metrics) in each backbone are highlighted in bold.
